top_signals.title: Early Warning Signs of Supply-Chain Attacks Live in the Dark Web
top_signals.summary: GitHub access sales, leaked repositories, and stolen API keys can all become supply-chain attack footholds. Flare explores how underground forums expose early signals tied to software supply-chain risk. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Citi’s Kaiser Sees Capital Demand Pressuring Markets
top_signals.summary: Stuart Kaiser, head of equity trading strategy at Citi, sees some market friction amid a “broad-based demand for capital” across initial public offerings, secondary stock sales and bonds markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX indicated to open up nearly 30% in historic Wall Street debut
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s AI-to-rockets group raised $75bn in the world’s biggest initial public offering
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: XRP sentiment falls to 8-month low, and that has been a buy signal before
Polish president vetoes crypto bill for third time ahead of MiCA deadline
top_signals.summary: Polish President Karol Nawrocki vetoed a bill to implement MiCA for the third time, just weeks before the end of the EU crypto framework's transitional period.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
